reviews.review_msg: It's pretty boring. Would not take IS again, but the prof is not too bad.
Eye opening class on relevant topics. Dr. Lyshaug is fantastic. She makes everything clear and is really helpful with questions.

Amazing prof! He is so passionate about what he does which makes the whole course that much more interesting.  He's super down to earth, nice, and funny. Also he's super humble which is so rare among profs,  i would definitely chose to take another course with him.

Didn't really think he knew how to teach much. At times, he was interesting but overall I liked my other classes better. I talked a lot in tutorials but still didn't get much participation. However, the final was pretty easier, better than i thought and I only studied 2 days for it! Wouldn't recommend the class though..hes not the clearest person.

To be honest, I was very upset with this course- I did study,participate and generally understand the material but hings that were emphasized strongly in the course were not on the exam- it consisted mostly of the video clips he provided in September, and the Teacher assistant presentations, not at all from the textbook or his lectures.
agree 100% with below comment. Absolutely hated this class! Class has been over for 3 weeks and she has yet to hand back assignments from November. Would not recommend her to anyone.
It was boring to many reading, I had sick TA though. But you have to memorize everything he says. Not the greatest marker
